input.title: Command: Swap with parent
input.body:
Add a `swapParent` command (title: `Swap with parent`) and a corresponding toolbar button that swaps the cursor thought’s text with its parent’s text.

Find an appropriate icon from https://thenounproject.com/.

## Steps to Reproduce

```
- a
  - b
  - c
```

1. Set the cursor on `b`
2. Activate `swapParent`.

## Expected Behavior

```
- b
  - a
  - c
```
